URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-php
Language: php
Microsoft Azure SDK for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MISP/MISP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MISP/MISP
Language: php
MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/meeting-calendar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/meeting-calendar
Language: php
The plugin powering https://make.wordpress.org/meetings/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/php-ai-client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/php-ai-client
Language: php
A provider agnostic PHP AI client SDK to communicate with any generative AI models of various capabilities using a uniform API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/phpunit-test-runner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/phpunit-test-runner
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/plugin-check
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/plugin-check
Language: php
A repository for the new Plugin Check plugin from the WordPress Performance and Plugins Team.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wporg-main-2022
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wporg-main-2022
Language: php
A block-based child theme for WordPress.org, plus local environment

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/facebook-php-business-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/facebook-php-business-sdk
Language: php
PHP SDK for Meta Marketing API

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/librenms/librenms
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mozilla/mediawiki-bugzilla
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mozilla/mediawiki-bugzilla
Language: php
A MediaWiki extension that provides read-only access to the Bugzilla REST API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu-web
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu-web
Language: php
the browser-facing portion of osu!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shopware/shopware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shopware/shopware
Language: php
Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 3.100 community extensions
